name: HoverCardRoot
description: Root controller for a hover card. Shows content on hover with configurable open/close delays.
whenToUse: Showing additional information about a link or element on hover (user profiles, previews).
avoidWhen: Interactive content that needs clicks - use Popover. Simple text hints - use Tooltip.
accessibilityRequirements: HoverCardContent requires aria-label or aria-labelledby. Also opens on focus for keyboard users.

closeDelay.description: Milliseconds before hiding after mouse leaves.

onclose.description: Called when hover card is dismissed.

parts.name: HoverCardTrigger
parts.description: Element that triggers the HoverCard on hover/focus.

parts.name: HoverCardContent
parts.description: Content of the HoverCard. Stays open while hovered.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Must have aria-label or aria-labelledby (enforced by ModalLabelProps type).

examples.title: Hover Card
examples.code:
